name: Sample Population Data
description: Synthetic dataflow for plugin testing. Excel source + Combine Files pattern + UnpivotOtherColumns. Exercises HIGH RISK markers (Excel.Workbook, AzureStorage.Blobs, custom M function). No real credentials embedded.

pbi:mashup.document:
section Section1;
shared #"Population Estimates 2020" = let
  Source = AzureStorage.Blobs("https://samplestorage.blob.core.windows.net/"),
  Navigation = Source{[Name = "sample"]}[Data],
  #"Filtered rows" = Table.SelectRows(Navigation, each [Extension] = ".xlsx" and Text.Contains([Name], "population_2020")),
  #"Navigation 1" = #"Filtered rows"{[#"Folder Path" = "https://samplestorage.blob.core.windows.net/sample/Population/", Name = "population_2020.xlsx"]}[Content],
  #"Imported Excel" = Excel.Workbook(#"Navigation 1", null, true),
  #"Sheet1 sheet" = #"Imported Excel"{[Item = "Mid-2020 Persons", Kind = "Sheet"]}[Data],
  #"Skipped rows" = Table.Skip(#"Sheet1 sheet", 4),
  #"Promoted headers" = Table.PromoteHeaders(#"Skipped rows", [PromoteAllScalars = true]),
  #"Unpivoted other columns" = Table.UnpivotOtherColumns(#"Promoted headers", {"LSOA Code", "LA Name"}, "Age Group", "Population")
in
  #"Unpivoted other columns";
shared #"Population Trend" = let
  Source = AzureStorage.Blobs("https://samplestorage.blob.core.windows.net/"),
  Navigation = Source{[Name = "sample"]}[Data],
  #"Filtered rows" = Table.SelectRows(Navigation, each [Extension] = ".csv" and [Name] = "Population/population_trend.csv"),
  #"Navigation 1" = #"Filtered rows"{[#"Folder Path" = "https://samplestorage.blob.core.windows.net/sample/", Name = "Population/population_trend.csv"]}[Content],
  #"Imported CSV" = Csv.Document(#"Navigation 1", [Delimiter = ",", Encoding = 65001, QuoteStyle = QuoteStyle.None]),
  #"Promoted headers" = Table.PromoteHeaders(#"Imported CSV", [PromoteAllScalars = true]),
  #"Unpivoted other columns" = Table.UnpivotOtherColumns(#"Promoted headers", {"LSOA Code", "LA Name"}, "Year", "Value"),
  #"Renamed columns" = Table.RenameColumns(#"Unpivoted other columns", {{"Value", "Population Count"}})
in
  #"Renamed columns";
shared Parameter = "sample" meta [IsParameterQuery=true, Type="Text", IsParameterQueryRequired=true];
